note: Mathlib/Probability/Distributions/Gaussian/Basic.lean:45 — class IsGaussian {E} [TopologicalSpace E] ... (μ : Measure E) : Prop, a measure is Gaussian iff its pushforward by every continuous linear form is a real Gaussian measure; this IS the general (Banach-space) Gaussian-measure predicate the Wikipedia article defines.
verify_note: Decl confirmed at Mathlib/Probability/Distributions/Gaussian/Basic.lean:45 (class IsGaussian, docstring matches note verbatim); Wikidata Q5527840="Gaussian measure" (type of Borel measure); en-Wikipedia infinite-dim definition (pushforward by every linear functional L is a real Gaussian measure) is exactly this predicate, so match_kind=exact is honest, not overclaimed.
